---
title: "02 Create analytic dataset"
author: "Alexandra Tejada-Strop"
format: html
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
# Load packages
library(tidyverse)
library(here)

# Define path to cleaned data
clean_path <- here("data", "processed-data", "prams_clean.rds")

# Check if cleaned data exists
if (!file.exists(clean_path)) {

  message("Cleaned dataset not available. Skipping analytic dataset creation. Use prams_analytic_localfix.rds in data/processed-data as described in the README.")

} else {

  # Try to read cleaned data
  dat <- tryCatch(
    readRDS(clean_path),
    error = function(e) {
      message("Cleaned dataset is present but could not be read in this environment. Skipping analytic dataset creation. Use prams_analytic_localfix.rds in data/processed-data as described in the README.")
      return(NULL)
    }
  )

  if (!is.null(dat)) {

    dim(dat)
    names(dat)

    dat |> count(ask_dprs, sort = TRUE)
    dat |> count(pp_depress, sort = TRUE)

    # Create analytic dataset
    analytic_dat <- dat |>
      select(
        id,
        pp_depress,
        ask_dprs,
        mat_age_pu,
        mat_ed,
        income8,
        hispanic,
        married,
        bpg_deprs8,
        hth_anx,
        kotelchuck,
        pnc_1trm,
        wtanal,
        stratumc,
        sud_nest,
        nest_yr
      ) |>
      mutate(
        screened = case_when(
          ask_dprs %in% c(1, "1") ~ 1,
          ask_dprs %in% c(2, "2") ~ 0,
          TRUE ~ NA_real_
        ),
        pp_depress_bin = case_when(
          pp_depress %in% c(1, "1") ~ 1,
          pp_depress %in% c(2, "2") ~ 0,
          TRUE ~ NA_real_
        )
      ) |>
      filter(!is.na(screened), !is.na(pp_depress_bin))

    # Create processed-data folder if needed
    dir.create(here("data", "processed-data"), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

    # Save analytic dataset
    saveRDS(analytic_dat, here("data", "processed-data", "prams_analytic_localfix.rds"))

    # Confirm saved
    file.exists(here("data", "processed-data", "prams_analytic_localfix.rds"))

    # Quick checks
    dim(analytic_dat)

    analytic_dat |> count(screened) |> mutate(pct = n / sum(n))
    analytic_dat |> count(pp_depress_bin) |> mutate(pct = n / sum(n))

    analytic_dat |>
      count(screened, pp_depress_bin) |>
      group_by(screened) |>
      mutate(pct = n / sum(n))

    message("Analytic dataset created successfully.")
  }
}
```
